name: Blue Star Foods Corp.
summary: Blue Star Foods Corp., an international seafood company, processes, imports, packages, and sells refrigerated seafood products. It offers pasteurized crab meat, and other seafood products, under the Blue Star, Pacifika, Oceanica, Crab & Go Premium Seafood, Lubkin, First Choice, Good Stuff, and Coastal Pride Fresh brands. The company sells its products to food service distributors, wholesalers, retail establishments, and seafood distributors in the United States, Canada, and Europe. Blue Star Foods Corp. was formerly known as John Keeler & Co. Inc. Blue Star Foods Corp. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Miami, Florida.
